items.summary: Fix the save diagram functionality so that when a user saves a diagram, it is correctly persisted to the backend and reappears when the diagram list (loadout/sidebar) is opened or refreshed. The saved diagram should appear in DiagramSidebar and LoadDiagramDialog after saving without requiring a page reload.

In the AttackPathToolbar, restrict drag-and-drop behavior on icon buttons so that only the icon image element is draggable, not the text label beneath it. The draggable attribute and drag event handlers (onDragStart) should be scoped to the icon image element only, not the entire button or label text. The selected element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[7]/button[3] is one such toolbar icon button.
